metadata.author: Ezra
metadata.subject: God's Full Chronology of the Old Testament People of God — from Adam through the Generation of the Returned Captives — to Show the Line and the Preparation of the Coming Christ.

2: These are the sons of Israel: Reuben, Simeon, Levi, and Judah, Issachar, and Zebulun,
Dan, Joseph, and Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.

1.text: The genealogy starts with Adam, the first man, to show that the history of God's chosen people is linked to the entire human race in view of Christ's incarnation.
